class.name: ResourceCache
class.description: [ResourceCache] stores cache resources in the user directory. It can be used to store temporary resources created at runtime, such as [E3DModel]. If a [code]hash[/code] is provided, the cache is automatically invalidated. If the [code]hash[/code] does not match, the cache entry is overwritten, preventing the cache from growing when the source changes.

method.name: clear
method.description: Clears all cache files in [member cache_dir] directory set by [method ResourceCache.create]

method.name: create
method.description: Creates a [ResourceCache] instance with [member cache_dir] set.

method.name: get
method.description: Loads a cached resource from a stable filename. If [param hash] is not empty, the cache entry is valid only when a matching sidecar file at [code]<cache file>.hash[/code] exists and contains the same value.

method.name: has
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the main cache file exists. If [param hash] is not empty, returns [code]true[/code] only when a matching sidecar file at [code]<cache file>.hash[/code] exists and contains the same value.

method.name: remove
method.description: Removes cached resource from the cache.

method.name: set
method.description: Saves a cached resource to a stable filename. If [param hash] is provided, it is written verbatim to a sidecar file at [code]<cache file>.hash[/code]. If [param hash] is empty, any existing sidecar hash file is removed.
